//: Realtime Database security rules for Finance Hub.
//1: Both Elly and Eric must be able to read/write the shared tree.
//2: Eric's monthly bills + allocate-from-payables broke because the old rules only granted access to Elly's account.
//3: Compare/Insights/Household views need each user to READ the other's budget, so reads are open to both authorised emails.
//4: Deploy via Firebase Console > Realtime Database > Rules, or `firebase deploy --only database`.
